name: HWR_WLNS_FEATURE_SETTINGS
description: This table stores the wellness feature settings

columns.Name: FEATURE_SETTINGS_ID
columns.Comments: This column indicates the wellness feature settings Id

columns.Name: IS_ACTIVE
columns.Comments: This column indicates the active row of  Wellness feature settings table

columns.Name: IS_WELLNESS_POINTS_ENABLED
columns.Comments: This is column indicates wellness points enabled/distabled. 0 is disabled and 1 is enabled

columns.Name: IS_RESET_POINTS_ENABLED
columns.Comments: This is column indicates Reset enabled/distabled. 0 is disabled and 1 is enabled

columns.Name: IS_CT_INTEGRATION_ENABLED
columns.Comments: This column indicates CT reward integration is enabled/disabled. 0 is disabled and 1 is enabled

columns.Name: POINTS_RESET_MONTH
columns.Comments: This column stores the month of the reset date

columns.Name: POINTS_RESET_DAY
columns.Comments: This column stores the day of the reset date

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_START_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the beginning of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: EFFECTIVE_END_DATE
columns.Comments: Date Effective Entity: indicates the date at the end of the date range within which the row is effective.

columns.Name: CREATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who created the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATED_BY
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the user who last updated the row.

columns.Name: CREATION_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the creation of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_DATE
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the date and time of the last update of the row.

columns.Name: LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN
columns.Comments: Who column: indicates the session login associated to the user who last updated the row.
